title: IPS ER Layer Lint Rules
description: Cross-file semantic lint rules for ER table definitions. Enforces three-layer architecture constraints (DATA/{应用层}/{平台层} isolation).

rules.title: {应用层}-to-{应用层} cross-module FK forbidden
rules.description: No FK (fk_ref or fk[] entry) may reference a table defined in a different {应用层} module file. Must use soft reference (_key + _id) instead.
rules.check: For each fk_ref or fk[].ref_table, if source file layer='{应用层}' and target table is in a different module_id, report ERROR.
exceptions: Same-domain sub-modules (e.g. {交易模块1} ↔ {交易模块2}) may keep FK if explicitly decided

rules.title: DATA-to-{平台层} reference forbidden
rules.description: DATA layer tables must not have FK or soft_ref referencing {平台层}/COL layer tables. Use VARCHAR business key lookup instead.
rules.check: For each field with fk_ref or in fk[], if source file layer='DATA' and target table is in a COL module, report ERROR.

rules.title: DATA-to-{应用层} FK forbidden
rules.description: DATA layer tables must not have FK referencing {应用层} layer tables. Soft reference or event-driven backfill only.
rules.check: For each fk_ref or fk[].ref_table, if source file layer='DATA' and target table is in a {应用层} module, report ERROR.
exceptions: sub_order.filing_id → filing (E06 event backfill, soft ref with no FK constraint)
sub_order.case_id → case (E07 event backfill, soft ref with no FK constraint)

rules.title: Soft ref field pair completeness
rules.description: Each soft reference should ideally have both {target}_key and {target}_id fields. Missing pair is a warning, not error.
rules.check: For each field named {target}_key or {target}_id, verify the complementary field exists in the same table.
